title: uavsim · flight results
description: Figure-eight SIL: controller × sensor matrix (LQR/LQG and PID × ideal, GPS+IMU naive, GPS+IMU KF, AHRS, IMU-only), Monte Carlo on GPS+IMU LQG, and a time-scale envelope for hover-linearization limits. Simulation only.

metrics.sim_message: The solver successfully reached the end of the integration interval.
The solver successfully reached the end of the integration interval.

envelope.title: Limits of hover-linearized LQR (ideal full state)
envelope.description: Time-scale τ on the figure-eight (τ=1 portfolio path). Primary story: idealized full-state LQR designed on hover A,B — where tracking fails as speed/tilt leave the linearization. LQG (full-channel KF) is shown as a secondary overlay; it is not the sensor-reconstruction teaching case (see Estimation tab).
notes: LQR gains from hover A,B linearization (small-angle).
Classic small-angle validity is often cited near ~15° tilt; closed-loop success may extend further until tracking fails hard.
LQG uses the same linear A,B for KF predict — mismatch grows with aggression.

estimation_matrix.title: Controller × sensor teaching matrix
estimation_matrix.description: Same elevated figure-eight for every cell. Rows: hover LQR (with KF = classic LQG) vs PID cascade. Columns: full-state ideal, GPS+IMU naive (partial zeros on the bus), GPS+IMU with linear KF, AHRS-like (att+ω), IMU-only (ω). KF uses the hover linear model; it does not invent GPS when position is unmeasured. Compare laws across a column — not only LQR vs PID ideal.

scenarios.label: Ideal LQR
scenarios.lesson: Upper bound when the plant is fully observed.

scenarios.label: GPS+IMU naive → LQR
scenarios.lesson: Incomplete bus (zeros for att/vel) breaks hover LQR.

scenarios.label: GPS+IMU LQG
scenarios.lesson: State reconstruction + noise rejection recovers tracking.

scenarios.label: AHRS LQG
scenarios.lesson: No GPS: attitude+rates still let the KF help; position tracking degrades but stays finite vs naive blow-up.

scenarios.label: IMU-only LQG
scenarios.lesson: Honesty case: rates alone do not observe position; filter cannot invent GPS — soft failure / drift.

scenarios.label: Ideal PID
scenarios.lesson: Full-state PID on the same path (second controller baseline).

scenarios.label: GPS+IMU naive → PID
scenarios.lesson: Same incomplete bus as LQR naive — cascade also suffers zeros.

scenarios.label: GPS+IMU KF → PID
scenarios.lesson: KF feeds x_hat to PID (not LQG; law is cascade, not K).

scenarios.label: AHRS KF → PID
scenarios.lesson: GPS-denied with attitude reference; compare RMSE to AHRS LQG.

scenarios.label: IMU-only KF → PID
scenarios.lesson: Same observability wall as LQG: rates alone cannot hold position.
